shots.title: Plugin discovery + loader framework
shots.notes: Created packages/core/src/plugins.ts (~150 lines). Types: PluginType, PluginManifest, DiscoveredPlugin, PluginLoadResult, PluginsConfig. Functions: validatePluginManifest, discoverPlugins, isPluginEnabled. Added PluginsConfig to SlopeConfig. Pattern follows loadCustomRoles() — sync fs, try/catch per file, collect errors. 20 tests in plugins.test.ts.

shots.title: Pluggable metaphor loaders

hazards.description: MetaphorDefinition has no type field — discoverPlugins needed to infer type from directory context

shots.notes: Added loadPluginMetaphors(cwd) to plugins.ts. Scans .slope/plugins/metaphors/*.json, validates via validateMetaphor(), registers via registerMetaphor(). Test fixture exposed that MetaphorDefinition lacks a type field — fixed by inferring type from directory in discoverPlugins. 12 tests.

shots.title: Custom guard plugins

hazards.description: GuardName union type constraint — CustomGuardDefinition needed standalone interface with string name instead of extending GuardDefinition

shots.notes: Core: CustomGuardDefinition, AnyGuardDefinition, registerCustomGuard (idempotent), getAllGuardDefinitions, getCustomGuard, clearCustomGuards. Widened generateClaudeCodeHooksConfig to AnyGuardDefinition[]. loadPluginGuards in plugins.ts. CLI guard.ts: loads plugins, dispatches custom guards via execSync, guard list shows [custom]. CLI hook.ts: uses getAllGuardDefinitions. 9 tests.

shots.title: Plugin CLI + init + MCP integration

hazards.description: TypeScript type narrowing — builtinGuardNames.includes(g.name) failed because GuardName[] vs string from AnyGuardDefinition. Fixed with explicit string[] annotation.

shots.notes: Created slope plugin list/validate command. init creates .slope/plugins/{metaphors,guards}/. metaphor.ts loads plugin metaphors before resolution. MCP registry adds 6 plugin function entries. 8 CLI tests.

conditions.description: Architecture sprint — new subsystem touching core, CLI, and MCP packages

nutrition.description: Clean build + all 853 tests pass (639 core + 36 store + 132 CLI + 46 MCP) after each commit
2 focused commits: core (S17-1/2/3) then CLI+MCP (S17-3/4). Commit after each build verification.
Followed loadCustomRoles() pattern from roles.ts — sync fs, try/catch per file, collect errors. Consistent with codebase conventions.
All existing 804 tests continue to pass. 49 new tests added. Zero regressions.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth and well-scoped. The plan was detailed enough that implementation was mostly mechanical — the biggest decisions had already been made. Three minor hazards were encountered and resolved inline without backtracking.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The plugin system is now live. To add a custom metaphor: drop a MetaphorDefinition JSON in .slope/plugins/metaphors/. For guards: drop a JSON with {name, hookEvent, matcher?, level, command} in .slope/plugins/guards/. The command receives hook JSON on stdin. Use slope plugin validate <path> to check before deploying. PluginsConfig in .slope/config.json supports enabled/disabled lists for filtering.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The MetaphorDefinition type has no type field — it was designed as a pure display config, not a manifest. The discoverPlugins function needed to infer type from directory context rather than requiring it in the file. Also, the GuardName string union made it impossible to extend GuardDefinition directly — the separate CustomGuardDefinition interface was the right call from the plan.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: S18 (PR Signals) can now leverage the plugin system for extensible signal parsers. The pattern of scan-dir → validate → register is proven and reusable. The guard plugin dispatch (execSync with stdin piping) opens the door for any external tool integration.

bunker_locations: MetaphorDefinition has no type field — plugin discovery must infer type from directory
GuardName is a string union — custom guards need standalone CustomGuardDefinition interface
AnyGuardDefinition union causes TypeScript narrowing issues with Array.includes()
yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/plugins.ts: New file — plugin discovery, validation, metaphor/guard loaders
packages/core/src/guard.ts: CustomGuardDefinition, AnyGuardDefinition, custom guard registry
packages/cli/src/commands/plugin.ts: New file — slope plugin list/validate
packages/cli/src/commands/guard.ts: Custom guard dispatch via execSync
packages/cli/src/metaphor.ts: Loads plugin metaphors before resolution
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — clean execution with minor hazards addressed inline
Plugin system follows established patterns: loadCustomRoles (roles.ts), registerMetaphor (metaphor.ts)
Custom guards are idempotent — safe to call loadPluginGuards multiple times
No scope creep: delivered exactly the plan specification
